evals.prompt: Resolve whether these two records refer to the same organization: official site https://www.okta.com and LinkedIn company profile https://www.linkedin.com/company/okta-inc/. Return confidence, evidence, schema record, and knowledge graph.
evals.expected_output: Should identify the records as the same organization with high confidence, provide supporting evidence from domain and official profile linkage, and return a schema record plus graph.

evals.prompt: Build an identity fabric for Okta, Slack, and a user account. Show account, workspace, SSO, SCIM, and provider relations. Return the result as schema record, relation edges, and SurrealDB-ready records.
evals.expected_output: Should produce normalized identity relations such as has_account, single_sign_on_with, scim_provisioned_by, member_of_workspace, and output thing/relation style records.

evals.prompt: Check whether these two customer accounts are duplicates. Compare domain, location, provider identity, and public profiles. Recommend merge, review, or keep_separate and explain why.
evals.expected_output: Should return a resolution result with confidence, evidence, and a recommended_action without overclaiming.

evals.prompt: Enrich this organization using official site, LinkedIn, G2, Google Business, and public news. Include industries, profiles, important data points, trust-aware source handling, and a knowledge graph.
evals.expected_output: Should return structured enrichment including industries, profiles, source-aware evidence, and graph edges.

evals.prompt: Find public signals for this person including promotion, relocation, social-only life-event updates, bans, complaints, and other important data points. Keep social-only claims labeled clearly.
evals.expected_output: Should distinguish verified findings from reported_publicly or social_only signals and include trust-aware provenance.

evals.prompt: Find nearby coworking spaces in Bangalore and rank them by location, rating, relevancy, recency, contextuality, and trust_score. Explain the ranking and include sort/filter attributes.
evals.expected_output: Should surface local results with map-aware ranking attributes and explain the ranking tradeoffs.

evals.prompt: From these public sources, create an action record showing who did what, when, where, and upon whom. Include source_of_information, trust_score, and action type classification.
evals.expected_output: Should return a structured action record with actor, action_type, target, time, location, source, trust score, and status.

evals.prompt: Map the ecosystem around a social cause, identifying nonprofits, campaigns, sponsors, partners, and public advocates. Return schema records, important data points, and a knowledge graph.
evals.expected_output: Should identify multiple related entities, preserve source trust distinctions, and return a useful graph.

evals.prompt: Compare Okta and Microsoft Entra for SSO, SCIM, app directory coverage, and workspace identity relationships. Return normalized attributes and relation edges.
evals.expected_output: Should compare identity providers using official docs and output normalized identity-related relations.

evals.prompt: Return the result of this enrichment as SurrealDB-ready thing, action, source, and relation records.
evals.expected_output: Should shape the output into storage-ready records instead of only prose.
